variants: Benjamin Hardy is a landscape architect who currently resides in Buckeye Terrace. He is known for his innovative design principles and has been honored with the Mistvale Torch Commendation for his contributions to the field. In addition to his work, he has also authored the book Harmonic Tether Unit, which explores the integration of natural elements within architectural practices. Benjamin is an active member of the Catseye Art Forgers, a society dedicated to the craft of art forging. His passion for landscape architecture continues to drive his creative endeavors while living in his vibrant community.
